reviews.comment:
parada obligada en el tramo BS.AS. - ROS....cargar nafta, picar algo y seguir....buena atención tanto en playa como en el bar....

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the Buenos Aires - Rosario route... fill up with gas, grab a bite to eat, and continue on... great service both on the forecourt and in the bar...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBMXFHQllREAE

reviews.comment:
La mejor estación de servicio de Buenos Aires a Rosario por Ruta 9. No se pierdan un buen desayuno antes de seguir viaje.

(Translated by Google)
The best gas station on the Buenos Aires to Rosario route 9. Don't miss a good breakfast before continuing your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnbk0zdDN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena cafetería, con lo necesario para una parada corta en el viaje.
La atención es aceptable con mozo o camarera en las mesas, lo cual no es fácil encontrar en la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
A good cafeteria, with everything you need for a short stopover.
The service is acceptable, with a waiter or waitress at the tables, which isn't easy to find on the road.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncGYybmZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
Good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRdGZIRld3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio de baños como casi todos los ACA. Compre un cafe para llevar y me lo dieron quemado. Nolo pude tomar. Mal servicio de mostrador y cocina

(Translated by Google)
Very good restroom service, like most ACAs. I bought a coffee to go and it was burnt. I couldn't drink it. Poor service at the counter and in the kitchen.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNVl5V1NREAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre queda de paso para salir de la ciudad hacia capital para llenar el tanque. Siempre buena atención

(Translated by Google)
It's always convenient on the way out of the city towards the capital to fill up the tank. Always good service.
